title: Hieracium neoserratifrons

intro: Hieracium neoserratifrons, also known as Hieracium serratifrons, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Hieracium neoserratifrons include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Hieracium neoserratifrons include infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support joint health and immune function.
